title: erigeron raphaelis
intro: Erigeron raphaelis, also known as Santa Cruz Island daisy, is a rare and endangered plant species native to California. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as supporting the immune system and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Erigeron raphaelis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for various methods of consumption and application.
